doc_parser.zig — Unified parser for SKILL.md and CAPABILITY.md frontmatter.

 Extracts YAML frontmatter (name, description, anchors) and the first paragraph
 from Markdown documentation files. Shared by:
   - staged.zig (skill excerpts)
   - query_engine.zig (skill loading)
   - sync_engine.zig (capability index generation)

members.name: freeDocExcerpt
members.signature: fn freeDocExcerpt(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, excerpt: DocExcerpt) -> void

members.name: parseDocContent
members.signature: fn parseDocContent(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, content: []const u8, verbose: bool) -> DocExcerpt

members.name: parseSkillDocContent
members.signature: fn parseSkillDocContent(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, content: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8

members.name: parseCapabilityDocContent
members.signature: fn parseCapabilityDocContent(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, content: []const u8, verbose: bool) -> DocExcerpt

members.name: parseDocContent: extract name and description from frontmatter
parseDocContent: extract anchors list from CAPABILITY frontmatter
parseDocContent: fallback to first paragraph when no frontmatter
parseDocContent: fallback to first body line when no description in frontmatter
parseDocContent: multiline description truncated to 300 chars
